targetPersona: foreign workers and residents in Korea
title: Living in Korea: Housing sample contract checklist
writtenContent:
Living in Korea: Housing sample contract checklist

Summary
Sample housing source for APPROVED queue validation.
shortSummary: Sample housing source for APPROVED queue validation.
whyItMatters: This turns practical housing information into a checklist that can be verified from the source.
checkNext:
1. Check whether the information applies to your region and status.
2. Save the source link before visiting an office, bank, hospital or service provider.
3. Ask Housing or a qualified professional before signing or paying.
imagePrompt: Clean editorial image for local validation: housing
sourceDisclaimer: Source-backed draft from Housing. Verify the original source before taking action.
